returns._0: uint256 Force inclusion deadline in seconds

checkAndRotate().details: Can be called by anyone, gas incentivized

executeForceInclusion(bytes32).details: Can be called by anyone after 24h deadline

params.txHash: Hash of transaction to force include

returns._0: bool True if past deadline and not executed
bool True if heartbeat is current

recoverSequencer(address).details: Only callable after suspension period or by admin

checkAndRotate().notice: Trigger health check and rotation if needed

getHealthInfo(address).notice: Get full health info for a sequencer

getHealthStatus(address).notice: Get health status of a sequencer

isForceInclusionOverdue(bytes32).notice: Check if force inclusion is past deadline

isHeartbeatCurrent(address).notice: Check heartbeat status for a sequencer

requestForceInclusion(bytes32).notice: Request force inclusion of a transaction
